modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be distracting grammar usage and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to install application from unidentified developer on Mac.

full_description_text: 
During a recent call, the user reported difficulties installing an application on their Mac. They encountered an error message stating that “Inkscape” cannot be opened because it is from an unidentified developer. The user mentioned that their security settings only permit installations from the App Store and recognized developers, which seems to be the root of the issue. This situation has caused some frustration as they were eager to use the application for their tasks.
